name: Codebase Context Scanner
description: Scans the existing codebase to map the current API surface, data models, and conventions. Publishes a contract that downstream lanes read via read-contract mode.

checks.fail: ⚠️  No packages directory — treating as single-package project

checks.prompt: Map the existing codebase API surface: (1) list exposed TypeScript interfaces and types, (2) identify existing route patterns, (3) note the state management approach, (4) flag any conventions that a new feature must follow. Be specific — list actual file patterns and naming conventions.

Identify the integration points a new feature must respect: (1) shared utility functions, (2) existing error handling pattern, (3) authentication middleware hooks, (4) test setup conventions. Context: {retryContext}
